Title: Moeru wakusei kara no dasshutsu!! Inochigake no Kamehameha
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: After evading Vegeta, Krillin, Gohan, and Dende return to the cave and meet with Bulma. While Goku is outside his ship fixing damage to the hull, Dr. Brief informs him that the asteroid that did the damage also knocked the ship of...
